case_title: BHAGAVAN S BURITZ et al VS. A RUIZ CONSTRUCTION COMPANY & ASSOCIATES et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURITZ, BHAGAVAN S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A RUIZ CONSTRUCTION COMPANY & ASSOCIATES RUIZ, ANTONIO $219.50 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $309.50, CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER MICHAEL JAMES RICHARDS. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER MICHAEL JAMES RICHARDS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $20.00) SERVED NOV-21-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ANTONIO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY BURITZ, BHAGAVAN S A RUIZ CONSTRUCTION COMPANY & ASSOCIATES RUIZ, ANTONIO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BURITZ, BHAGAVAN S RICHARDS, CHRISTOPHER MICHAEL JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT A RUIZ CONSTRUCTION COMPANY & ASSOCIATES RUIZ, ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-26-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (SEE NOTES)

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CHRISTOPHER MICHAEL JAMES RICHARDS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-26-2012 AT 3:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT A RUIZ CONSTRUCTION COMPANY & ASSOCIATES RUIZ, ANTONIO
